item.title: AlexSmithEcho: Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 4min Andoni Iraola had no doubts that his Cherries side would continue to push to the
item.description:
Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 4min Andoni Iraola had no doubts that his Cherries side would continue to push to the end of the season after he announced he was leaving - the boss is now even more motivated to secure Europe, which he said would be “massive”.
More from the boss:
#afcb De bournemouthecho.co.uk 5 90
